'''âg-y-f''' ('''kagayaf''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:poo|poo]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-y-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:poo|poo]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âg-y-f
|-
! Lemma
| kagayaf
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigayaf|thigayaf]] || [[word:jigayaf|jigayaf]] || [[word:shigayaf|shigayaf]] || [[word:kigayaf|kigayaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugayaf|thuthugayaf]] || [[word:jujugayaf|jujugayaf]] || [[word:shushugayaf|shushugayaf]] || [[word:kukugayaf|kukugayaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thugayaf|thugayaf]] || [[word:jugayaf|jugayaf]] || [[word:shugayaf|shugayaf]] || [[word:kugayaf|kugayaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thugayaf|thugayaf]] || [[word:jugayaf|jugayaf]] || [[word:shugayaf|shugayaf]] || [[word:kugayaf|kugayaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thegayaf|thegayaf]] || [[word:jegayaf|jegayaf]] || [[word:shegayaf|shegayaf]] || [[word:kegayaf|kegayaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothogayaf|thothogayaf]] || [[word:jojogayaf|jojogayaf]] || [[word:shoshogayaf|shoshogayaf]] || [[word:kokogayaf|kokogayaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thogayaf|thogayaf]] || [[word:jogayaf|jogayaf]] || [[word:shogayaf|shogayaf]] || [[word:kogayaf|kogayaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thogayaf|thogayaf]] || [[word:jogayaf|jogayaf]] || [[word:shogayaf|shogayaf]] || [[word:kogayaf|kogayaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠgayaf|thĂŠgayaf]] || [[word:jĂŠgayaf|jĂŠgayaf]] || [[word:shĂŠgayaf|shĂŠgayaf]] || [[word:kĂŠgayaf|kĂŠgayaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathagayaf|thathagayaf]] || [[word:jajagayaf|jajagayaf]] || [[word:shashagayaf|shashagayaf]] || [[word:kakagayaf|kakagayaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thagayaf|thagayaf]] || [[word:jagayaf|jagayaf]] || [[word:shagayaf|shagayaf]] || [[word:kagayaf|kagayaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thagayaf|thagayaf]] || [[word:jagayaf|jagayaf]] || [[word:shagayaf|shagayaf]] || [[word:kagayaf|kagayaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shagayaf|shagayaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshagayaf|goshagayaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishagayaf|gokishagayaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shagayafnĂŒ|shagayafnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshagayafnknĂŒ|goshagayafnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishagayafnĂŒ|gokishagayafnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shagayafshĂ«|shagayafshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshagayafnkshĂ«|goshagayafnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishagayafshĂ«|gokishagayafshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagayafro|shagayafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagayafnkro|goshagayafnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagayafro|gokishagayafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shagayafmu|shagayafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagayafnkmu|goshagayafnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagayafmu|gokishagayafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shagayafsher|shagayafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshagayafnksher|goshagayafnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishagayafsher|gokishagayafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shagayafng|shagayafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshagayafnkng|goshagayafnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishagayafng|gokishagayafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shagayafya|shagayafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshagayafnkya|goshagayafnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishagayafya|gokishagayafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shagayafyam|shagayafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshagayafnkyam|goshagayafnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishagayafyam|gokishagayafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagayafnĂŒshĂ«|shagayafnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagayafnknĂŒshĂ«|goshagayafnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagayafnĂŒshĂ«|gokishagayafnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagayafnĂŒro|shagayafnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagayafnknĂŒro|goshagayafnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagayafnĂŒro|gokishagayafnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagayafnĂŒmu|shagayafnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagayafnknĂŒmu|goshagayafnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagayafnĂŒmu|gokishagayafnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagayafshĂ«nĂŒ|shagayafshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagayafnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshagayafnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagayafshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishagayafshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagayafshĂ«ro|shagayafshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagayafnkshĂ«ro|goshagayafnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagayafshĂ«ro|gokishagayafshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagayafshĂ«mu|shagayafshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagayafnkshĂ«mu|goshagayafnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagayafshĂ«mu|gokishagayafshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagayafronĂŒ|shagayafronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagayafnkronĂŒ|goshagayafnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagayafronĂŒ|gokishagayafronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagayafroshĂ«|shagayafroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagayafnkroshĂ«|goshagayafnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagayafroshĂ«|gokishagayafroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagayafromu|shagayafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagayafnkromu|goshagayafnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagayafromu|gokishagayafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagayafmunĂŒ|shagayafmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagayafnkmunĂŒ|goshagayafnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagayafmunĂŒ|gokishagayafmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagayafmushĂ«|shagayafmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagayafnkmushĂ«|goshagayafnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagayafmushĂ«|gokishagayafmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagayafmuro|shagayafmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagayafnkmuro|goshagayafnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagayafmuro|gokishagayafmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
